title: [verify-response-status-codes] Aggregate failure: verify response status codes (26/26 scenario checks failed) on n/a — aggregate finding across endpoints — expected All 26 'verify response status codes' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour, observed [api-tester-verify-response-status-codes] quality outcome=FAIL; metric=0.0 (undocumented)
expected: All 26 'verify response status codes' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour

testing_steps: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that iterates every method+path in agent-foundry/data/openapi.json and sends the documented request (use the spec's example body) to http://localhost:8899.
3. Assert each observed status equals the documented code (200/201 on success; the documented error code for invalid-id variants such as GET /products/999999).
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/verify-response-status-codes/cases.json — this run recorded 26 of 26 checks failing.
